sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-04-20 07:38
- Distance: 5 km
- Moving time: 26:23
- Elapsed time: 26:39
- Elevation gain: 59 m
- Average heart rate: 173.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 190 bpm
- Average watts: 213.8 W
- Average speed: 11.4 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `172.5 bpm`, ranging from `162.9` to `182.1 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `164.3 spm`, with a working range of `131.4` to `170.5 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `165.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `163.0 spm` (-2.0 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:16 /km` across `5.006 km` in `26:23` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:05 /km` and second-half pace was `5:27 /km` (+21 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `173.3 bpm` average and `190 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `163.7 bpm` in the first half and `181.3 bpm` in the second (+17.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `26:23` out of `26:39` elapsed (99.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `64.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.6 m` and `27.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `28.6 m` in the first half and `35.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
